response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context in insurance or agile environments, German proficiency is only 'basic' (not sufficient for client-facing roles), and the resume reflects senior/lead roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse technologies including Java and cloud tools
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated agile practices (TDD, CI/CD) and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but required for client communication
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, misaligned with entry-level role
No explicit experience in insurance domain or agile digitalization projects
